context.audience: Developers building content-heavy sites, technical bloggers, documentation site maintainers, pSEO practitioners
pain_points: Choosing when to use React islands vs. plain HTML
Integrating dynamic features without sacrificing static performance
Content collections setup and Zod schema validation
Image optimization and responsive image patterns
Integrating AI-generated content into Astro's content model
monetization: Content platforms with affiliate or sponsor revenue
content_that_works: Content collection and Zod schema tutorials
subtopics: Astro content collections and type safety
